General.Name: Lai Group Holding Co Ltd
General.Description: Lai Group Holding Company Limited, an investment holding company, provides residential and commercial interior design and fit-out services in Hong Kong. The company is also involved in the property holding activities. Lai Group Holding Company Limited was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Sha Tin, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Office H, Kings Wing Plaza, Sha Tin, Hong Kong
